title: Memory, Context Windows, Compaction, and Retrieval · Failure Case: Working Memory
summary: Keep a long-running agent grounded without unlimited history. Planned artifact: Add and verify the loops working memory increment in a context and durable-memory policy. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Keep only current decision-relevant state in working context.
Inject timeouts, partial failures, duplicates, and restarts into loop tests.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
